name: Benchmark Email Marketing API
what_it_does: Benchmark Email marketing REST API for SMBs to manage email campaigns, automation workflows, contact lists, and performance analytics with multilingual support and international compliance for global email marketing. Enables AI agents to manage contact list creation and segmentation for email audience automation, handle email campaign creation and scheduling for campaign execution automation, access automation workflow building for drip campaign automation, retrieve campaign analytics and performance tracking for email ROI automation, manage A/B testing configuration for campaign optimization automation, handle bounce and unsubscribe list management for compliance automation, access landing page creation for email conversion automation, retrieve contact tagging and segmentation for targeted email automation, manage campaign template library for consistent email brand automation, and integrate Benchmark Email with Salesforce, Shopify, WordPress, and CRM platforms for end-to-end email marketing automation.
use_cases: Sending campaigns from email marketing automation agents
Managing contacts from list hygiene automation agents
Running A/B tests from campaign optimization agents
Building automations from drip campaign agents
not_for: High-volume transactional email (use SendGrid or Mailgun for transactional)
Enterprise-scale email with advanced segmentation (use Salesforce Marketing Cloud or Marketo)
E-commerce specific email automation (use Klaviyo for e-commerce)
best_when: An SMB or international team wanting AI agents to automate email campaign management, contact list maintenance, drip automation, and performance analytics through Benchmark Email's internationally-focused email platform.
avoid_when: INTERNATIONAL COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENTS BY REGION: Benchmark Email serves international markets with varying email compliance (CAN-SPAM for US, CASL for Canada, GDPR for EU, LGPD for Brazil); automated email campaigns must apply correct compliance configuration per recipient region; automated global campaigns without region-specific compliance configuration creates regulatory violation in applicable jurisdictions. EMAIL DELIVERABILITY SHARED IP REPUTATION: Benchmark Email uses shared sending infrastructure; sender reputation is partially influenced by other senders on shared IPs; automated high-volume campaigns with poor list hygiene may encounter shared IP reputation impact; implement list hygiene automation (remove bounces, inactives) before high-volume automated sends. AUTOMATION TRIGGER DELAY FOR CONTACT-BASED WORKFLOWS: Benchmark Email automation triggers may have processing delay between contact action and workflow trigger; automated time-sensitive drip campaigns must account for trigger evaluation latency; automated behavioral trigger workflows requiring immediate response may experience delay between behavior and first email delivery.

auth.notes: Benchmark Email uses API key and OAuth for integrations. REST API with JSON. Los Angeles, California HQ. Founded 2004 by Curt Keller and Denise Keller. Bootstrapped, privately held. Products: Email campaigns, automation, A/B testing, landing pages, surveys, reports. Multilingual platform (9 languages). International focus: US, Mexico, Japan, Brazil, Spain. GDPR. CASL. CAN-SPAM. Integrations: Salesforce, Shopify, WordPress, Zapier. Serves SMB globally. Competes with Mailchimp, Brevo, and MailerLite for SMB email marketing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan (3,500 emails/month, 500 contacts, basic features, Benchmark branding)
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro plans based on contact count ($13/mo for 500 contacts, scaling up); annual discount 16%
pricing.notes: Los Angeles CA. Bootstrapped. Free tier (3.5K emails). Contact-based pricing. Annual discount. No credit card for free.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; campaign send and contact queries throttled; webhooks for email events (open, click, bounce, unsubscribe)

known_agent_gotchas: CONTACT IMPORT DEDUPLICATION HANDLING: Benchmark Email contact import handles duplicates by updating existing contact; automated contact sync must implement idempotent import logic; high-frequency automated import of same contact list creates unnecessary API load; implement change detection before bulk import to only import new or changed contacts

CAMPAIGN SEND CONFIRMATION vs SCHEDULED CONFIRMATION: Benchmark Email campaign send can be immediate or scheduled; automated campaign management must distinguish between send (immediate) and schedule (future) operations; automated campaign deployment using wrong endpoint creates immediate send for campaigns intended for future delivery

AUTOMATION TRIGGER CONTACT ELIGIBILITY RULES: Benchmark Email automation workflows have entry criteria (list membership, tag, date); automated contact addition to automation must verify contact meets entry criteria before enrollment attempt; automated workflow enrollment for contacts not meeting criteria creates silent enrollment failure

UNSUBSCRIBE LIST MANAGEMENT FOR COMPLIANCE: Benchmark Email maintains global unsubscribe list; automated contact re-import after unsubscribe creates immediate unsubscribe suppression; automated list cleaning that removes unsubscribed contacts and re-imports creates compliance violation; implement unsubscribe status check before any contact re-import

API RATE LIMITS LOWER ON FREE PLAN: Benchmark Email free plan has lower API rate limits than paid plans; automated high-frequency operations (bulk contact import, multiple campaign analytics pulls) on free plan create rate limit errors; evaluate paid plan for production automation workflows with frequent API calls
agent_readiness.security_notes: Email marketing. CAN-SPAM, CASL, GDPR, LGPD. API key/OAuth2. US. Email list and campaign data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Email marketing. CAN-SPAM, CASL, GDPR, LGPD. API key/OAuth2. US. Email list data.
